channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18945] corrupted ldlm flags on enqueue may lead to a crash
item.description:
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.699497] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.704922] CPU: 22 PID: 120208 Comm: mdt05_007 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G W OE ------------ 3.10.0-957.1.3957.1.3.x4.3.25.x86_64 #1
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.719653] Hardware name: Viking Enterprise Solutions VSSEP1EA/VSSEP1EA, BIOS 10.06 05/26/2020
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.729506] Call Trace:
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.733110] [<ffffffff8b964e41>] dump_stack+0x19/0x1b
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.739376] [<ffffffff8b95e550>] panic+0xe8/0x21f
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.745281] [<ffffffffc0b4e8fb>] lbug_with_loc+0x9b/0xa0 [libcfs]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.752590] [<ffffffffc100bcac>] __req_capsule_get+0x63c/0x740 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.760413] [<ffffffffc0f953d0>] ? ldlm_lock_enqueue+0x280/0xae0 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.768398] [<ffffffffc0fb5e62>] ? ldlm_export_lock_get+0x12/0x20 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.776456] [<ffffffffc100be08>] req_capsule_server_get+0x18/0x20 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.784496] [<ffffffffc0fbde13>] ldlm_handle_enqueue0+0xdb3/0x1630 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.792619] [<ffffffffc0fe76f0>] ? lustre_swab_ldlm_lock_desc+0x30/0x30 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.801172] [<ffffffffc1048032>] tgt_enqueue+0x62/0x210 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.808315] [<ffffffffc104d10a>] tgt_request_handle+0x96a/0x1680 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.816231] [<ffffffffc1028081>] ? ptlrpc_nrs_req_get_nolock0+0xd1/0x170 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.824807] [<ffffffffc0b4ec0e>] ? ktime_get_real_seconds+0xe/0x10 [libcfs]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.832881] [<ffffffffc0ff2886>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x256/0xb10 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.841545] [<ffffffffc0feed61>] ? ptlrpc_wait_event+0xd1/0x3a0 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.849307] [<ffffffff8b2d6b22>] ? default_wake_function+0x12/0x20
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.856526] [<ffffffff8b2cbdeb>] ? __wake_up_common+0x5b/0x90
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.863319] [<ffffffffc0ff655a>] ptlrpc_main+0xcca/0x1ca0 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.870532] [<ffffffffc0ff5890>] ? ptlrpc_register_service+0x1010/0x1010 [ptlrpc]
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.879007] [<ffffffff8b2c1f81>] kthread+0xd1/0xe0
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.884780] [<ffffffff8b2c1eb0>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.891759] [<ffffffff8b977c1d>] ret_from_fork_nospec_begin+0x7/0x21
2021-10-11 03:07:49 [17394297.899069] [<ffffffff8b2c1eb0>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
item.summary: corrupted ldlm flags on enqueue may lead to a crash

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61802
Subject: LU-18945 ldlm: discard invalid lock request
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 9ed0538344326524d3299669228d50fc94477c6f

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58928/
Subject: LU-18945 ldlm: discard invalid lock request
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ae23c1583141f07d985ffba31bfa58ae552b0179

vitaly_fertman thanks for the patch. Is this something you hit during (ab)normal operation or are you running fuzz testing/fault injection into the RPCs? If the latter, it would be great to make this code/framework available so more issues can be found.

"Vitaly Fertman <vitaly.fertman@hpe.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58928
Subject: LU-18945 ldlm: discard invalid lock request
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: b777562b34f09d423c11acea479a985b5b8f34d0
